chunks.title: Blessing of the Righteous
chunks.reason: Introduces the blessed man who fears Yahweh and describes his earthly blessings.

chunks.title: Character of the Upright
chunks.reason: Describes the moral qualities, stability, and generosity of the righteous man.

chunks.title: Fate of the Wicked
chunks.reason: Contrasts the reaction and ultimate fate of the wicked against the righteous.
